The [[Hydrospeare Corporation]] '''Combat Aquaspeeder''' was an aquatic design based on the [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeder]]. As a part of the "modification packages" from Hydrospeare, the company's [[Design Team Beta]] took the [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] design and made it aquatic. This particular package had found [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] acceptance. The main change was the replacement of the cockpit with a sturdier model for two collaborative [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. Additionally, the body was streamlined, adding more [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] in the wings, and the weapon was replaced by an upper turret, while at the same time keeping the traditional harpoon of the T-47 in availability.<ref name="AIR" />
